title: fagonia arabica var. tilhoana
intro: Fagonia arabica var. tilhoana, also known as Fagonia, is a plant species belonging to the family Zygophyllaceae, native to the Middle East and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery, making it a valuable remedy in the treatment of various health conditions. Fagonia is traditionally prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is also used in the form of ointments and creams for topical application.
